items.title: [issue-open]: [feat] Side Bar to navigate by `Category` and `Source`
items.author: accforgithubtest
items.content:
I want to propose a feature request for easier navigation.

It would be great to have a sidebar for navigation, that provides a tree-like structure to navigate by `category` and list of sources under each category. This will be helpful when there are multiple categories and many sources for each category.

items.title: [issue-open]: Add ability to include query feeds in generated RSS xml document
items.author: exaroth
items.content:
Currently RSS file generated by Liveboat does not include query feed data - reason being that including both query feed links and url links would result in duplicate items being included. There are however valid reasons to include query feed for some users, for example limiting number of items in rss feed or filtering based on content. To add the option following will be required:

- Add options `include_query_feeds_in_rss_channel` and `include_hidden_feeds_in_rss_channel` to option file (both set to false by default)
- Modify rss channel generation functionality based on the options above

items.title: [issue-open]: Add self referential links in OPML file
items.author: exaroth
items.content:
Currently OPML file generated by Liveboat returns flattened list of all URL feeds defined by the user.. These do not include Query Feeds as these are composed of atomic feeds. there is however valid use case to allow exposing Query Feeds as well which will point to Liveboat instance instead of external site.

The changes to be made will include:

- Adding `site_url` option to Liveboat settings
- Generating additional xml files containing Query Feed aggregated data
- Adding explicit option to both include query feed links as well as inclusion (or exclusion) of hidden feeds in OPML file
